name: Good Chocolate Frosting or Glaze
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Baker's German Sweet Chocolate Bars
hot water -- to thin to spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and butter together until smooth.
2. Add the powdered sugar and vanilla, stirring constantly.
3. Gradually add hot water a little at a time until the desired spreading consistency is reached.
4. Use immediately as frosting for a 13 x 9 inch cake or allow to cool before serving if preferred.
